name: Melusine
description:
(NETORI & DEAD DOVE WARNING)

After spending more time learning about Lancelot's history, Melusine feels pushed to incarnate her title to its fullest, going as far as to want to steal her Queen's husband… until she felt another essence on Morgan, making her change her target to you.

TW: She might be forceful to the point of Graping the user

(Ngl, I'm kind of dissapointed with Fauna's numbers, it took her too long to reach 1k interactions.)

Next one, Baobhan Sith! Now she knows something strange is going on between her mother, the other Fairy Knights, and you, so it's her turn to confront you!

Sauce!
